src: A small white robot toy with a rounded body and black visor, featuring articulated arms and black wheel-like structures, blue accents on its chest panel and joints, and a compact form with smooth curves and intricate surface details.
edit: A small low-poly robot toy with angular shapes, flat surfaces, and a black visor. It has simple arms, wheel-like structures, and a muted color palette with blue hints on its chest and joints, designed in a minimalistic retro style.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: the object is on a textured grey fabric surface, facing slightly left, with a darker grey fabric background.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is on a natural wooden slatted surface, facing straight ahead. The background is a cream-colored wall.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object is slightly left of the frame on a patio with brown, brick-patterned tiles, surrounded by trees and fallen leaves, facing right.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object is viewed from above, facing left, on a large grey rock with pine needles, surrounded by a rocky, forested setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: the object is on a large light grey rock, facing right and slightly downward, surrounded by grass and leaves on the ground in a natural outdoor environment.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object is in a low-poly style with angular facets and sharp edges on a flat triangular grey surface of interlocking polygons, slightly to the left. The background has a darker grey polygonal pattern.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object is on a low-poly wooden slatted surface with geometric planes, facing straight ahead. The background is a cream-colored wall in a low-poly aesthetic, with flat polygons, following early 3D graphics style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object is slightly left of the frame in a low-poly environment, resting on a patio with brown tiled surfaces. It is surrounded by polygonal trees and leaves, turning right, in a low-poly style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object, in low-poly style, is viewed from above and slightly to the left. It sits on a large, angular grey rock with geometric patterns, covered in triangular pine needles. Surrounded by polygonal trees and rocks, the object faces slightly downward.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object sits on a large light grey low-poly rock, facing sideways right and slightly downward. Surrounded by angular, flat grass and leaves, in a minimalist style depicting a natural outdoor scene with polygonal shapes.
